config.title: Wizzard
config.script:
function fopen() if HARUI(UAR_CMDID(CMDID_WIZZARD_OFERTA)) then runWizzard 'uruchom modul automatycznie end if fopen=false end function
'CWizzard #include "50209"
'uprawnienia #include "50101"
function runWizzard()
dim pWizzard set pWizzard=CWizzard(false)
dim pContainer set pContainer=new COfertaWizzard
pWizzard.add_step PAGE_FORM_WIZZARD_OFERTACENNIK_PRODUKT pWizzard.add_step PAGE_FORM_WIZZARD_OFERTACENNIK_OPAKOWANIE pWizzard.add_step PAGE_FORM_WIZZARD_OFERTACENNIK_GRUPOWANIESORTOWANIE pWizzard.add_step PAGE_FORM_WIZZARD_OFERTACENNIK_FILTRPRODUKTOW
pWizzard.add_container pContainer pWizzard.run
end function
function onWizzardComplete(pWizzardPage)
dim pOfferModule
select case pWizzardPage.m_pContainer.m_nDestFormat
case WIZZARD_OFERTA_EXCEL
set pOfferModule = doc_.getmodule(60276) onWizzardComplete = pOfferModule.create_offer_Excel (pWizzardPage.m_pContainer)
end select
onWizzardComplete = false
end function
class COfertaWizzard public m_bNazwa public m_bSkrot public m_bVat public m_bRodzaj public m_bJE public m_bGP public m_bNazwaM public m_bCelny public m_bPkwiu public m_bOpis public m_bC1 public m_bC2 public m_bC3
'opakowania public m_bGenerujOpak public m_bKod_O public m_bKodK_O public m_bNazwaM_O public m_bNazwa_O
PRICE_FLD_MEMBER(1) PRICE_FLD_MEMBER(2) PRICE_FLD_MEMBER(3) PRICE_FLD_MEMBER(4) PRICE_FLD_MEMBER(5) PRICE_FLD_MEMBER(6)
public m_bWAgaN public m_bWAgaB
public m_bGrupuj public m_nGroupOrder public m_bSortujWGrupieDesc public m_nOrder
public m_nDestFiltr public m_nIdobjFiltr public m_strNameFiltr
public m_nDestFormat
public m_pRS public m_pFieldsArray
dim m_strWatch dim m_bGrupa
private sub class_initialize() m_bNazwa = "1" m_bSkrot = "1" m_bVAT = "0" m_bRodzaj = "0" m_bJE = "0" m_bGP = "0" m_bNazwaM = "0" m_bCelny = "0" m_bPkwiu = "0" m_bOpis = "0" m_bC1 = "0" m_bC2 = "0" m_bC3 = "0"
m_bGenerujOpak = "1" m_bKod_O = "0" m_bKodK_O = "0" m_bNazwaM_O = "0" m_bNazwa_O = "0"
PRICE_FLD_INIT(1,"1","0") PRICE_FLD_INIT(2,"0","0") PRICE_FLD_INIT(3,"0","0") PRICE_FLD_INIT(4,"0","0") PRICE_FLD_INIT(5,"0","0") PRICE_FLD_INIT(6,"0","0")
m_bWAgaN = "0" m_bWAgaB = "0"
m_bGrupuj = "1" m_nGroupOrder = clng(1) m_bSortujWGrupieDesc = "0" m_nOrder = clng(1)
m_nDestFiltr = clng(1) m_nIdobjFiltr = clng(0) m_strNameFiltr = ""
m_nDestFormat = WIZZARD_OFERTA_EXCEL
m_strWatch = "" m_bGrupa = false
end sub
private function compose_query() compose_query = + "" + _ " select 'gp_nazwa'=grupa.strNazwa , " + vbNewLine + _ " 'prod_nazwa' = prod.p_strNazwa , " + vbNewLine + _ " * from vlist_n5produkt_listopakowania as prod " + vbNewLine + _ " join n5grupaproduktow as grupa on grupa.idobj = prod.p_pGrupaProd " + vbNewLine + _ " join n5jednostka as j_opak on prod.c_pJednOpak = j_opak.idobj " + vbNewLine + _ " join n5jednostka as j_waga on prod.c_pJednostkaWagi = j_waga.idobj " + vbNewLine + _ " order by gp_nazwa , prod_nazwa "
end function
public function begin_process() set m_pRS = trans_.createadors(compose_query) end function
public function get_next_row() get_next_row = not m_pRS.eof if not get_next_row then exit function end if
set m_pFieldsArray = trans_.afc.new_navoarray()
if m_strWatch = cstr(m_pRS("gp_nazwa")) then m_pFieldsArray.add(cstr(m_pRS("prod_nazwa"))) m_bGrupa = false m_pRS.movenext else m_strWatch = cstr(m_pRS("gp_nazwa")) m_pFieldsArray.add(cstr(m_pRS("gp_nazwa"))) m_bGrupa = true end if
end function
public property get grupa() grupa = m_bGrupa end property
end class
